name: 32-Point Hardwired I/O Control Panel, 120/240VAC, NEMA 12
short_desc: Pre-wired UL 508A-listed control panel with 32-channel hardwired I/O, EtherNet/IP, DIN rail–mounted PLC, and NEMA 12 steel enclosure.
story_html: The PLC-CTRL-32CH is a pre-engineered industrial control panel designed to drop into mid-complexity automation cells without bench rework. All field wiring is pre-tagged per NEC Article 409 and tested at the factory against a full point-to-point continuity report. Every panel ships with a full as-built drawing package in PDF and DWG formats. UL 508A listing covers North American compliance; CE marking available on request. Volume pricing available at 5+ units — submit a quote request.

name: 10-in. Industrial Color Touchscreen HMI, EtherNet/IP, 24VDC
short_desc: 10-in. WSVGA capacitive touchscreen HMI with 65,536-color display, EtherNet/IP and Modbus TCP/RTU, IP65 front panel rating.
story_html: The HMI-10-IND brings high-resolution operator interface to your line without premium-brand licensing costs. Ships with the PanelPro Studio development environment and 24 months of free firmware updates. IP65 front panel rating makes it suitable for wash-down and light-dust environments. Pairs directly with AllenWorks PLC panels and most third-party controllers via Modbus TCP/RTU or EtherNet/IP.

name: 10 HP Variable Frequency Drive, 480VAC 3-Phase, Sensorless Vector
short_desc: 10 HP / 480V 3-phase VFD with open-loop sensorless vector control, built-in EMI filter, BACnet MS/TP and Modbus TCP.
story_html: The VFD-10HP-480 delivers precise motor speed control for pump, fan, and conveyor applications. Open-loop sensorless vector mode achieves ±0.5% speed regulation without encoder feedback on most loads. Built-in Class C2 EMI filter reduces panel wiring complexity. BACnet MS/TP and Modbus TCP enable direct integration into building automation and SCADA systems. IP20 enclosure rated for panel mounting per UL 508C.

name: Photoelectric Sensor Kit, M18 Barrel, Through-Beam, IO-Link, 12-Pk
short_desc: M18 barrel through-beam photoelectric sensors, IO-Link V1.1, 30 m range, M12 4-pin connector, IP67. Factory-calibrated. 12-pack.
story_html: The SNSR-PHOTO-12PK bundles a dozen industrial-grade M18 through-beam sensors for line installations and pilot projects. IO-Link V1.1 compatibility enables diagnostic data, parameterization, and process values over standard M12 wiring — no additional hardware required. Each unit is factory-calibrated and ships in individual ESD bags with a factory test certificate. IP67 rating handles coolant splash and parts-washer proximity.

name: 2 kW Servo Motor & Drive Kit, 200-240VAC, Absolute Encoder, IP65
short_desc: 2 kW brushless AC servo with 23-bit absolute encoder, IP65 motor body, matched 200–240 VAC drive with EtherNet/IP.
story_html: The SRVO-2KW-E65 combines a 2 kW brushless servo motor with a matched single-axis drive unit for high-precision positioning applications. The 23-bit absolute multi-turn encoder eliminates homing cycles after power-down, reducing cycle time and mechanical wear on home-switch mechanisms. IP65 motor body handles outdoor and washdown duty. Drive includes auto-tuning, vibration suppression, and full EtherNet/IP Class 1 cyclic I/O. Stock is limited — volume orders subject to lead-time confirmation.

name: Industrial IoT Gateway, 5G LTE, OPC-UA/MQTT, 4-Port GbE, DIN Rail
short_desc: 5G Sub-6 GHz IIoT gateway with OPC-UA, MQTT, Modbus, 4× GbE, RS-485, wide-temp DIN rail, −40 to +70 °C.
story_html: The IIOT-GW-5G-CE bridges shop-floor assets to cloud SCADA and MES platforms without field wiring changes. MQTT 3.1/5.0 and OPC-UA Server/Client modes cover 95% of industrial protocol combinations out of the box. Edge computing runtime allows Node-RED and Python-based preprocessing at the source. The DIN-rail form factor and wide-temperature certification (−40 to +70 °C) make it suitable for panel enclosures, outdoor cabinets, and mobile equipment.

name: 8-Port Managed Gigabit Ethernet Switch, DIN Rail, Ring Topology, 24VDC
short_desc: 8-port GbE managed DIN-rail switch, MRP/RSTP ring topology <20 ms failover, redundant 24 VDC power, IP30, −40 to +70 °C.
story_html: The SW-ETH-8G-IND is engineered for deterministic Ethernet on factory floors and control panels. MRP and RSTP ring topology with sub-20 ms failover prevents line stoppage during single-link faults. QoS with 8 priority queues ensures time-sensitive EtherNet/IP and PROFINET traffic is never crowded out by background data. Redundant 24 VDC power inputs accept simultaneous independent feeds for N+1 power protection.

name: 6-Button Operator Station, Illuminated, NEMA 4X, Pre-Wired, M22
short_desc: 6-button illuminated M22 operator station, NEMA 4X fiberglass, pre-wired DIN-rail terminal block, includes 1× selector switch & 1× pilot light.
story_html: The PBS-6BTN-4X ships pre-wired with 6 M22 operator devices in a NEMA 4X fiberglass enclosure: 2 illuminated pushbuttons (green/red), 2 momentary pushbuttons, 1 key-selectable 3-position selector switch, and 1 LED pilot light. All elements are individually numbered and wired to a detachable DIN-rail terminal block inside. Button colors and legend labels are configurable at order time — specify in the order notes field. Pre-wired design cuts installation to under 30 minutes for a standard start/stop configuration.

specs.Operator Devices: 2× illuminated PB (M22), 2× momentary PB, 1× selector, 1× pilot light

name: Limit Switch Assortment Kit, 24 Pc., Roller/Lever/Plunger, M12, IP67
short_desc: 24-piece M12 limit switch assortment — 8 roller-arm, 8 adjustable lever-arm, 8 spring-plunger. IP67, NPN/PNP selectable, factory tested.
story_html: The LSWA-24PC-KT is a stocking kit for maintenance departments and integrators who need a breadth of limit switch styles on the shelf. Includes 8 roller-arm, 8 adjustable lever-arm, and 8 spring-plunger switches — all M12, NEMA 6, IP67. Every unit is factory-tested to 500,000 switching cycles and labeled with part number, serial number, and date code. NPN/PNP output polarity is selectable via rear-panel DIP switch without opening the housing.

name: DIN Rail Power Supply, 24VDC, 480W, 20A, PFC, Parallel Operation
short_desc: 480W 24 VDC DIN-rail PSU, active PFC >0.95, parallel-able N+1, alarm dry-contact, 85–264 VAC universal input.
story_html: The PSU-DR-24V480W is a workhorse 24 VDC panel power supply rated for continuous 480 W output at ambient temperatures up to 60 °C without derating. Active PFC keeps input current distortion below 5% THD on sensitive building circuits. Units can be paralleled for N+1 redundancy without additional hardware or diode modules. The alarm dry-contact output integrates directly into PLC watchdog inputs for immediate fault notification. DIN rail or wall-mount installation in ≤40 mm panel depth.

name: Rack-Mount Online UPS, 3 kVA/2.7 kW, 2U, Double-Conversion, SNMP
short_desc: 3 kVA/2.7 kW online double-conversion UPS, 2U rackmount, 8 min runtime at full load, SNMP card included, VRLA batteries.
story_html: The UPS-RM-3KVA-2U provides true online double-conversion power protection for control-room servers, networking equipment, and edge compute nodes. Zero transfer time eliminates micro-interruptions that restart PLCs or corrupt historian data. SNMP v3 network management card is included — not an optional add-on. 8-minute runtime at full load gives operators enough time for controlled shutdown per IEC 62040-3 Class VFI. Rack-ears, rack-slide kit, and hot-swap battery module included.

name: Electric Walkie Pallet Jack, 4,500 Lb. Cap., 24VDC, On-Board Charger
short_desc: 4,500 lb electric walkie pallet jack, AC drive motor, 24V on-board opportunity charger, 48-in. forks, 8-in. lift height.
story_html: The EPJ-4500-AC is a warehouse-grade electric walkie pallet jack built for multi-shift distribution center operations. AC drive motor reduces brush maintenance intervals by 60% versus DC models and delivers regenerative braking to extend battery charge cycles. The on-board 24V opportunity charger accepts a standard 120 VAC outlet for 30-minute top-ups during breaks without returning to a dedicated charging station. Floor-level delivery from Austin TX — freight quote automatically generated at checkout. Stock is critically limited.
